Descripton: Clinical data for ovarian cancer patients covering demographics, diagnosis and treatment. Dataset includes 608 patients, 4,222 rows (multiple records per patient), 210 columns
Limitations: Many missing values, Mostly older white American women,  Many columns irrelevant to ovarian cancer

Descripton: Multi-region, multi-modal profiling of 42 untreated high-grade serous ovarian cancer (HGSOC) tumor/normal pairs.
Protein and gene expression data for 3,819 ovarian cancer-relevant genes.
Limitations: No patient-level clinical records; No treatment data

Dataset Name: TCGA-OV \| The Cancer Genome Atlas Ovarian Cancer Collection
Descripton: DICOM imaging dataset for 143 TCGA-OV patients containing CT and MRI scans.
Identifier System: Patient ID / Study Instance UID / Series Instance UID
Limitations: No survival, stage or treatment information in this file

Dataset Name: TCGA-OV-Proteogenomics \| Integration of CT-based Qualitative and Radiomic Features with  Proteomic Variables in Patients with High-Grade Serous Ovarian Cancer: An Exploratory Analysis
Descripton: Study of 20 HGSOC patients from TCGA-OV; contains contrast-enhanced CT images.
Limitations: Very small cohort (n=20); Findings not generalizable due to small sample size

Dataset Name: TCGA-OV-Radiogenomics \| Imaging Features, and Correlations with Genomic and  Clinical Data from the TCGA Ovarian Radiology Research Group
Descripton: Retrospective analysis of 93 HGSOC patients with pre-surgical abdominal and pelvic CT scans from TCIA.
Ovarian cancer screening dataset containing serial CA-125 blood test results, TVU findings and combined screening outcomes.
Contains information about the diagnostic procedures prompted by positive ovarian cancer screen, diagnostic procedures  associated with any ovarian cancers diagnosed during the 13 years of follow-up.

Dataset Name: Integrated Genomic Analyses of Ovarian Carcinoma
Access Method: Via direct download using GDC manifest
Descripton: The dataset includes somatic mutation data, copy number alterations, gene and miRNA expression,  DNA methylation, and clinical outcomes.
Limitations: Limited histologic diversity; Limited longitudinal clinical data

Descripton: This dataset provides harmonized somatic mutation and clinical summary tables for ovarian cancer cohorts.
Limitations: Strong cohort skew toward late-stage high-grade serous ovarian cancer
